name: aima-framework
description: AIMA_framework — renderer-less, cross-platform game-app foundation (ECS + host loop + hot-reload + platform + Renderer interface). NO graphics libs: each project supplies its own renderer.

physics.description: General-purpose Jolt physics (opt-in; enable AIMA_WITH_JOLT in CMake).

hd2d-renderer.description: HD2D renderer stack (DX12 + SDL_GPU + imgui/asset glue). Enable with the vcpkg feature AND -DAIMA_HD2D_RENDERER=ON.
